trips.title: My Trips
trips.newTripHint: Give your trip a name and set your departure city. You'll add destinations, transport, and accommodation next.

destinations.noDestinationsHint: Add your first destination below. Each one can include transport details, accommodation info, and notes.

transport.title: Transport
transport.departureModalDescription: Update departure transport details for trip #{tripId}.

errors.reorderDestinations: Something went wrong while reordering. Your changes were reverted.
errors.addDestination: Could not add the destination. Please try again.
errors.deleteDestination: Could not delete the destination. It has been restored.
errors.saveDestination: Could not save destination details. Please try again.
errors.importTrip: Could not import this trip. The file may be corrupted or incompatible.
errors.invalidFileFormat: This file doesn't look like a valid trip export. Try a different file.
errors.invalidJson: This file couldn't be read. Make sure it's a .json file exported from TripAIvisor.
errors.generateShareLink: Could not generate the link. Please try again.
errors.copyLink: Could not copy to clipboard. Try selecting and copying the link manually.
errors.saveDepartureTransport: Could not save departure transport details. Please try again.
errors.saveReturnTransport: Could not save return transport details. Please try again.
errors.saveActivity: Could not save the activity. Please try again.
errors.deleteActivity: Could not delete the activity. Please try again.
errors.cityRequired: Enter a city name to add a destination.
errors.activityNameRequired: Enter a name for the activity.
errors.activityTimeRangeInvalid: End time must be after start time.
errors.durationInvalid: Duration must be at least 1 day. Use 0 for stopovers.
errors.budgetInvalid: Enter a valid number for the budget.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: TripAIvisor helps you organize multi-city trips with all the details in one place.
onboarding.featureDestinations: Add destinations and build your route
onboarding.featureShare: Export or share your itinerary with others
onboarding.tripDetailStep1: Set your trip dates using the date pickers above
onboarding.tripDetailStep2: Add destinations below - each can include transport and accommodation
onboarding.tripDetailStep3: Share or export your trip when you're ready
